metadata.title: Don Fiapo De la Manga - The Alpha of Memecoins
metadata.description: He doesn't bark — he decrees. The blockchain now has a monarchy. Join the reign.
metadata.keywords: memecoin, cryptocurrency, NFT, staking, airdrop, DeFi, Lunes, Don Fiapo, blockchain, token, ICO, play to earn, web3

hero.title: Don Fiapo De la Manga
hero.subtitle: The Alpha of Memecoins
hero.description: He doesn't bark — he decrees. The blockchain now has a monarchy. Join the reign.

legend.title: The Legend of Don Fiapo
legend.subtitle: The story of the mutt who became royalty.
legend.description: In the forgotten alleys of the blockchain, a stray dog found a golden mango. He didn't eat it — he decreed it. Don Fiapo is the pixelated royalty of decentralization.

tokenomics.title: Royal Tokenomics
tokenomics.subtitle: The Royal Treasury of the Kingdom of Fiapo
tokenomics.note: Every transaction is a tribute. Every holder, a noble. Every meme, a decree.

order.title: The Order of Fiapeiros
order.subtitle: Swear Loyalty to the Don. Receive the Glories of the Kingdom.
order.description: By holding $FIAPO, you join the Order of Fiapeiros — defenders of decentralized humor. You receive: Airdrops, Missions, Loot boxes, Stickers and NFTs.

comparison.title: Don Fiapo and the Court of Defeated Dogs
comparison.subtitle: While others bark… Don Fiapo rules.
comparison.quote: "While others settle for the moon, I demand the throne."
comparison.author: — Don Fiapo, the Royal Mutt

cta.title: Choose Your Side
cta.subtitle: Either you're a FUD peasant, or you're a Royal Fiapeiro.

footer.tagline: Don Fiapo De la Manga is a meme, but it's serious.
footer.copyright: © 2025 Don Fiapo De la Manga. All rights reserved.

staking.title: Royal Staking
staking.subtitle: Stake your $FIAPO and earn rewards fit for royalty

donBurn.title: Don Burn
donBurn.description: Burn tokens, earn more. The eternal flame of the kingdom.

donLunes.title: Don Lunes
donLunes.description: Powered by the Lunes network. Stability for the nobles.

donFiapo.title: Don Fiapo
donFiapo.description: The royal pool. Maximum prestige for loyal holders.

ico.title: Royal NFT Collection
ico.subtitle: Mint your place in the Kingdom

prestige.title: Prestige Bonus
prestige.desc: Limited to the first 100 early adopters or last 10 survivors per tier!
prestige.earlyAdopter: You can still earn the early adopter bonus of {amount} $FIAPO ({remaining} slots left!)
prestige.lastSurvivor: Slots for the first 100 are gone, but you can still win if you are one of the last 10!
prestige.congratsDesc: You are one of the first 100 to reach this level! 🎉
prestige.bonusLabel: You earned an extra bonus of:
prestige.vestingInfo: The bonus will be released after the ICO ends with a 30-day vesting period.

errors.ICONotActive: ICO is not active at the moment.

errors.MaxSupplyReached: Max supply reached for this tier.
errors.PaymentAlreadyUsed: This payment has already been used.

airdrop.title: Royal Airdrop
airdrop.subtitle: Claim your share of the kingdom

affiliate.title: Affiliate Program
affiliate.subtitle: Invite friends and earn royal rewards

ranking.title: Royal Ranking
ranking.subtitle: The greatest nobles of the kingdom

modal.headline: MILLIONS IN AIRDROPS AWAIT!
modal.body: By order of His Majesty Don Fiapo, the gates to the Royal Treasury are open! We are distributing MILLIONS OF DOLLARS in value to our loyal community. Secure your noble status in the Kingdom and claim your share of the $FIAPO Airdrop before the civilians arrive.
modal.signature: His Majesty Don Fiapo De la Manga, Sovereign of the Kingdom
modal.privacyFooter: By decree of the Crown, all loyal subjects shall receive their share.

Games.title: Royal Arena
Games.subtitle: Challenge your luck and skill in the kingdom's games.

spin.title: Royal Wheel of Fortune
spin.description: Spin the wheel to win incredible prizes, including the Don's treasure.

payment.title: Confirm Purchase
payment.description: You are about to purchase a spin package for the Royal Wheel of Fortune.
payment.disclaimer: The amount will be debited from your connected wallet. Ensure you have sufficient balance.

tug.title: Tug of War
tug.description: Pull the rope with your war dogs and defeat the opponent.

meme.title: Meme Battle
meme.description: Use your best memes to duel and prove who is the funniest in the kingdom.
